race.description: 2026 IH Capital Flashing Red Discr. Hcp Pace (L)
race.comment: FERNCO NEL NZ (12) is a progressive pacer who landed a winning hat trick when he led to score by close to 2m last time out, taking his record here to an impressive 13 from 17. First try at this distance but he is proven at the standing start having come from this handicap to score last month. SPEAK THE TRUTH (14) has had two months off since winning at this venue but owns a strong fresh record and was readied with two trials. He has earned his 20m handicap and is proven at this distance. PATH TO GREATNESS (7) drew wide so was far from disgraced in finishing midfield when resuming. Owns a strong second-up record so should be improved and he strikes at 50 per cent here. TYSON NZ (1) jumps in grade but looked good in winning his last two starts before a let-up, the latest at this distance. Readied with an easy trial win and should get the favours from this starting position. DASHING (13) is worth a place in the exotics.
